features.notes: Construction/IO scripts under scripts/data-frame/ and scripts/data-access/. package-test.ts auto-runs all package scripts.
DataFrame column add/access/sort/type-change scripts under scripts/data-frame/.
Row selection, bitset boolean ops, aggregation, and filter-state scripts.
Metadata tags, semantic types, qualified numbers, value matchers and patterns.
Grid cell custom rendering, tooltips, sparklines, html cells and paint hooks.
Grid column resize, ordering, color-coding, styles, scrolling.
Viewer-type sample scripts under scripts/ui/viewers/types/ and js viewers/.
Dynamic viewer creation, scatter-plot rendering, viewer events, filter widgets.
View, layout, ribbon, toolbox, docking, shell-window scripts.
Atomic UI control sample scripts under scripts/ui/components/ and related folders.
Container/flexbox/splitter/full-screen layout primitives.
Dialogs, wizards, form-creation, input controls and validation.
Subscribing to and preventing platform events from scripts/events/.
Function registry, handlers, init hooks, info panels, custom viewers.
Multi-language script samples (Python/R/JS) plus shell context inspection.
grok.dapi samples for entities, fetch, groups, current user, audit, settings.
Project/space listing and opening via dapi.
File-store access from JS scripts.
Ad-hoc / parameterized / dynamic SQL with Postgres + MSSQL connections and demo queries.
Chem JS API samples plus the bioinformatics demo grouped under domains/.
PCA, clustering, imputation, predictive model, random data, Pearson correlation.
Mini-app demos under scripts/demo/, scripts/ui/apps/, and scripts/misc/.
